purpose: Evacuate public DTOs, result envelopes, fail-closed shapes, projection handles, runtime graph mappings, stage policies, supported sources, CLI usage, and message text from the resolver into JSON authority.

doctrine.compression: SEJ owns the world. Resolver reads the language.
doctrine.collapseLaw: If it is a public shape, policy, message, projection, graph mapping, blocker, usage surface, or evidence contract, it belongs in JSON.
doctrine.resolverResidue: Only generic interpretation mechanics remain in host language.
nonNegotiables: No public result object shape in resolver code.
No hard-coded DTO shaping in resolver code.
No hard-coded projection handle fields in resolver code.
No hard-coded runtime dependency graph mappings in resolver code.
No hard-coded human-facing CLI usage or error text in resolver code.

loc.sej.resolver.result-envelope.dto.v1.description: Canonical resolver result envelope. Replaces shapeResult object literal.

loc.sej.resolver.finding.dto.v1.description: Canonical finding shape used by fail-closed and guardrail outputs.

loc.sej.resolver.fail-closed-evidence.dt.description: Canonical evidence block for fail-closed resolver output.

loc.sej.resolver.contract-execution-evid.description: Canonical evidence shape for resolved contracts.

loc.sej.resolver.runtime-state.dto.v1.description: Runtime state shape used by reference resolution.

loc.sej.resolver.operation-state.dto.v1.description: Operation state available to declared projection sources.

loc.sej.resolver.projection-evidence.dto.description: Evidence emitted by DTO projection handling.

loc.sej.resolver.dto-projection-handle.d.description: Resolver handle returned when resultProjection is declared.

loc.sej.resolver.runtime-dependency-fact.description: Runtime dependency fact shape consumed by runtime import projection.
Runtime dependency fact collection consumed by runtime import projection.

loc.sej.resolver.runtime-import-projecti.description: Evidence emitted by runtime import projection.
Resolver handle returned when runtimeImportProjection is declared.

loc.sej.resolver.cli-invocation.dto.v1.description: CLI invocation DTO produced from declared CLI grammar.

loc.sej.resolver.cli-result.dto.v1.description: CLI result DTO; exit code is projected from status catalog.

messages.contract_missing: A SEJ contract object is required.
messages.invalid_step: Each stage must be an object.
messages.adapter_blocked: Adapter steps are not executed inside Resolver.
messages.write_blocked: Write steps are not executed inside Resolver.
messages.cli_json_path_required: A JSON file path is required.
messages.runtime_import_projection_contract_missi: Runtime import projection contract is missing.
messages.runtime_dependency_fact_shape_invalid: Runtime dependency fact shape is invalid.
messages.runtime_import_projection_operation_unsu: Runtime import projection operation is unsupported.
messages.projected_runtime_import_shape_invalid: Projected runtime import shape is invalid.

stageTypes.collapseNote: Remove regex template replace from resolver and route through primitive catalog.
Prefer declared resultProjection; dto stage remains compatibility-only.

resolve.description: Resolve a SEJ or contract file.

facade:generate.description: Generate a facade through SEJ-declared facade composition.

primitiveBacklog.purpose: Capabilities needed to fully collapse resolver.cjs from shape owner into JSON authority interpreter.

capabilities.reason: Replace failClosed object literal and message text.
Render message catalog templates without JS string interpolation.
Replace selector if-chain with selector catalog dispatch.
Replace predicate if-chain with predicate catalog dispatch.
Replace stage type branching with stage type catalog dispatch.
Unify DTO and runtime import projection handling.
Project runtime imports from JSON mapping.
Build runtime graph from JSON node/edge templates.

primitiveBacklog.implementationRule: Each capability must be implemented once per resolver language only as generic interpreter mechanics; public shapes and mappings remain in JSON.

patterns: Adapter steps are not executed inside Resolver.
Write steps are not executed inside Resolver.

allowedKernelResidue: generic process argv mechanics for CLI doorway

expected.assertion: output matches result-envelope DTO and hash is stable across languages
runtime graph node/edge projection comes from JSON authority pack
usage text projected from cliContracts, not JS array

handoffPacket.purpose: Collapse resolver.cjs and cli.cjs from shape/policy/message owners into thin generic JSON authority interpreters.
blockedActions: do not add new hard-coded result envelopes
do not add new message text in resolver code
do not add projection family config in host language
do not special-case product or SDK names
do not convert JSON authority into hidden JS/Python/C# scripts
do not treat generated bodies as promotion-valid
acceptanceCriteria: All public result envelopes are projected from JSON DTO/projection contracts.
All blocker and message text is resolved from JSON catalogs.
Projection family configs are loaded from JSON.
Runtime dependency graph mappings are loaded from JSON.
CLI usage and command policy are loaded from JSON.
Node/Python/C# produce the same shapes, blockers, hashes, and evidence for the conformance fixtures.
Resolver code contains only generic catalog lookup, traversal, dispatch, hash, file, and process mechanics.
